When To Book

Knowing when to book is as important as knowing where.

We track Club Med availability and pricing daily — so you know when conditions are in your favour and can book with confidence, not just hope.

"Two families. Same Club Med resort. Same week. One paid £1,600 more — not because they booked something different, but because they booked at a different moment in the cycle. This site exists to close that gap."

Live Signals

Current booking signals across Club Med ski resorts

Prices updated daily. Prices shown for 7 nights accommodation, Sunday departure. Click any resort for full price history.

The Method

How When To Book works

01

We track live Club Med pricing, updated daily.

Every major ski resort. Every Sunday departure across the season. Standard party sizes. We've been building this price history since spring 2026 — and it compounds in value with every passing week.

02

We analyse trends and availability over time.

A raw price is just a number. Context is what makes it actionable. We measure price direction, velocity of change, and availability tightening — the kind of longitudinal context that only consistent daily tracking over time can reveal.

03

We tell you whether to book now, watch, or hold.

No noise. No raw data dumps. A clear three-state signal per combination, updated daily. The decision is always yours — we just make sure you're making it with the right information.

Booking Alerts

We'll tell you when the window opens.

Leave your search with us. When the booking signal shifts in your favour — we'll let you know. No noise. No daily emails. Just the signal, when it matters.

We email only when the signal shifts to Favourable, or when a Watch resolves. You will not hear from us until the data justifies it.

We track Sunday departures for standard party sizes. If your dates differ, use the search above — we'll begin tracking your combination immediately.

Something went wrong — please try again.

Signal Guide

What each signal means

Favourable

Generous price drops — now is a good time to book.

Prices have fallen meaningfully since tracking began. The data suggests conditions are currently in your favour — booking now locks in a price that is below the recent trend.

Stable

Good availability — no urgency yet.

Prices are broadly flat since tracking began and availability remains comfortable. No strong signal either way — monitor and return when the picture develops.

Watch

Low availability or high pricing — consider booking to secure your place.

Prices have risen since tracking began, or availability is tightening. The data suggests the window to book at a reasonable price may be narrowing — act sooner rather than later.
